crime.value: Murder of Prince Louis in his sleep
crime.quote: I was killed in my sleep in the honest hours of the night.

victim.value: Prince Louis, son of a cruel king overthrown by rioters
victim.quote: I was the prince of all of England. My father was a cruel king to his land so they started a riot to seize him.

closed_world.value: Doncaster Mansion House where Louis haunts and Harry has moved
closed_world.quote: I haunt the Doncaster Mansion House.

red_herring.value: Ghost narrative potentially misdirects from real crime - Louis's murder presented as supernatural haunting
red_herring.quote: I tried to tell them to get out but they ignored me. I got out of bed only to look down at my transparent feet.

clue_fairness.value: Eight thieves stealing from murdered prince's room - specific detail available to reader
clue_fairness.quote: I 'woke up' to find 8 rubbish looking men in my room stealing my things.

social_world.value: Royal hierarchy and class conflict - cruel king's unfair rules to the poor triggered riot and violence
social_world.quote: My father was a cruel king to his land so they started a riot to seize him. His rules were unfair to the poor.

media_and_audience.value: House purchased 'abnormally low' - suggests concealed history or reputation affecting property value
media_and_audience.quote: it was abnormally low for a big house.

investigator_wound.value: Harry's family separation trauma coincides with move to haunted mansion - emotional vulnerability
